data.name: Per Scholas Security Labs
data.description: Hands-on labs from the Per Scholas Cybersecurity Analyst program, including Cisco Packet Tracer networking builds, SOC-style investigations, firewall rules, VPNs, and security troubleshooting.

data.name: UMGC Academic Projects
data.description: Course projects from UMGC’s B.S. in Cybersecurity Technology, including cloud migration designs, VPC architectures, secure network configurations, and risk-focused assignments.

data.name: Raspberry Pi Security Projects
data.description: 🔥 Security builds on Raspberry Pi such as WireGuard VPN, hardening exercises, and self-hosted services used to practice real-world secure remote access and monitoring.

data.name: Cloud Security & VPC Labs
data.description: AWS-focused labs including VPC design, public/private subnets, security groups, IAM, EC2 hardening, and secure web server deployment as part of cloud security practice.

data.name: Personal Cyber Labs
data.description: Independent projects, web security testing, SOC simulations, and enumeration labs.

data.name: Team-Based Security Case Studies
data.description: Team-based security labs and joint presentations completed with cohort members, emphasizing communication and shared problem-solving.
